### Bluesky

CodeGrind's new learn→tower→workspace flow boosts clarity, engagement, and skill transfer in DSA learning. See how the restructure works: https://rivie13.github.io/codegrind/refining-codegrind-learning-system #DSA #EdTech #Coding

### LinkedIn

Enabled: true

CodeGrind has restructured its Data Structures and Algorithms learning paths into a clear learn→tower→workspace sequence. This update separates guided concept learning, interactive practice in the Code Breach tower defense game, and final coding tasks in a dedicated workspace. The goal is to reduce cognitive load, frame gameplay as purposeful reinforcement, and mirror real-world problem-solving environments.

Supporting changes include refined learning logic, updated documentation with a V2 tower defense architecture overview, and improved communication workflows. This structure ensures learners build understanding before applying concepts interactively, culminating in a workspace phase that bridges theory to competitive coding.

Explore the full details here: https://rivie13.github.io/codegrind/refining-codegrind-learning-system #DSA #EdTech #Coding #LearningPath #SkillDevelopment
